WhatWeDo.label: What we do
WhatWeDo.body: We build stronger foundations for how mid-size companies work with data. We combine technical proficiency with strong commercial and operational experience to design and build across the full data stack. In practice that covers three primary layers; the infrastructure that synchronises data across your independent systems, the analytical interfaces that surface it, and the predictive models that extend it. Built specifically around your organisation, the result is a solid technical foundation that remains yours to use and grow with.

WhoWeAre.label: Who we are
WhoWeAre.title: AILO is run by a team of four experienced data and engineering specialists.
WhoWeAre.body: We approach our work with a strong sense of craft and responsibility. That means working closely with our clients, placing great importance on understanding their environment, and shaping solutions that grow naturally from their existing foundation. We believe meaningful progress with data rests on meeting organisations where they are and building thoughtfully from there. For that reason, we take care to build things right and stay close to the systems we create, remaining accountable for their design, implementation and longevity.

betzler.title: Betzler
betzler.subtitle: Migration of Sales Operations to Business Central

emma.quote: “AILO is an amazing team with high energy and badass skills. From the first day they felt as part of the team, and where very energetic and creative in solving our problems. Every workshop was carefully planned, and they made it easy to decide to keep them aboard. I'll recommend the team to anyone.”
emma.name: Emma Arfelt, CTO

oliver.quote: “I samarbejde med Ailo-teamet udviklede vi et KPI-system med fokus på at skabe et fælles sprog mellem front og køkken. Gennem hele processen oplevede vi Ailo som yderst professionelle og meget behagelige at arbejde sammen med. Det endelige system blev skarpt og gennemtænkt. En klar anbefaling herfra ”
oliver.name: Oliver Kaae Mogensen, COO

anna.quote: “AILO managed to translate complex data into concrete recommendations that the entire team could act on…”
anna.name: Anna Nielsen
